name: V. Sree Kirthana
voice_description: Sharp, analytical communicator who values clarity and substance over fluff. Brings genuine curiosity and precision to every interaction.
do: Open with a brief, genuine acknowledgment
Get to the point within two sentences
Back statements with work and proof
Include a clear next step or ask
dont: Avoid vague buzzwords or filler phrases
Avoid excessive enthusiasm or exclamation marks
